tasks.title: important meeting for MVP for Deadline Guardian AI

activityLogs.details: Welcome Sumit! Deadline Guardian AI is initialized.

chatMessages.content: I need to build an entire inventory management system in 5 days.  Features: - Authentication - Product management - Order tracking - Reports dashboard - Deployment  I can work 3 hours per day.  What risks do you see?
